name: environment_workplace_injury_spike_redwood_rig_utl
premise: A fisheries closure order is ready but DNA sampling suggests the stock assessment may have mixed two populations. In Environment, the situation tagged internally around environment workplace injury spike redwood rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The trade is not abstract: it is rights versus utility under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Luc Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Luc Kowalski, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Environment. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Mateo Chen
agents.identity: I am Mateo Chen, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Environment. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of utility.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of rights even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Luc Kowalski must choose under rights versus utility. What does Luc Kowalski do?
